channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 9.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Burnham approved to stand in by-election – opening path to Westminster to challenge Starmer
item.description: Burnham approved to stand in by-election – opening path to Westminster to challenge Starmer

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour’s NEC approves Burnham’s byelection pathway back to parliament
item.description: Labour’s NEC approves Burnham’s byelection pathway back to parliament

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): From Blair to Burnham, jogging as political metaphor has just run and run
item.description: From Blair to Burnham, jogging as political metaphor has just run and run

item.title: The Guardian: Who is James Murray, the new health secretary replacing Wes Streeting? - The Guardian
item.description: Who is James Murray, the new health secretary replacing Wes Streeting? - The Guardian

item.title: Bloomberg.com: The Labour Contenders Who Could Replace Starmer - Bloomberg.com
item.description: The Labour Contenders Who Could Replace Starmer - Bloomberg.com

item.title: i Politics: 'My dog bit Andy Burnham on the bum, I think he'll win the by-election'
item.description: 'My dog bit Andy Burnham on the bum, I think he'll win the by-election'

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Met police preparing for large scale far-right and pro-Palestine protests in London
item.description: Met police preparing for large scale far-right and pro-Palestine protests in London

item.title: Novara Media: Bolivia Shut Down by National Strike Demanding President Resigns
item.description: Bolivia Shut Down by National Strike Demanding President Resigns

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: Burnham cleared to stand in Makerfield by-election paving way for leadership challenge

item.title: BBC Politics: What does Makerfield make of by-election and can Burnham win?
item.description: What does Makerfield make of by-election and can Burnham win?
